---
title: "Patient Archetype Parameter Statistics"
output: html_document
params:
  input_csv: "artifacts/manual/patient_archetype_tables/patient_archetype_yeo17_summary_97411c0ec4.csv"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/patient_archetype_statistics"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  candidate <- candidates[[length(candidates)]]
  normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

for (pkg in c("svglite", "ggdist", "ggtext", "paletteer", "patchwork", "ggrepel")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}

library(ggdist)
library(ggtext)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

set.seed(97411)

input_csv <- resolve_repo_path(params$input_csv, must_exist = TRUE)
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))
output_stem <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input_csv))

required_cols <- c(
  "patient_id",
  "archetype",
  "occupancy",
  "mean_dwell_ms",
  "assignment_similarity",
  "n_peak_maps",
  "covered_yeo17_networks",
  "mapped_yeo17_bipolar_channels"
)

raw_df <- read.csv(input_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(raw_df))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Input CSV is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

raw_df <- raw_df %>%
  mutate(
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    archetype = factor(archetype, levels = sort(unique(archetype))),
    archetype_label = factor(paste("Archetype", archetype), levels = paste("Archetype", levels(archetype))),
    occupancy_pct = occupancy * 100
  )

metric_specs <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "occupancy_pct",
    "mean_dwell_ms",
    "assignment_similarity",
    "n_peak_maps",
    "covered_yeo17_networks",
    "mapped_yeo17_bipolar_channels"
  ),
  metric_label = c(
    "Occupancy (%)",
    "Mean dwell time (ms)",
    "Assignment similarity",
    "Peak maps (n)",
    "Covered Yeo17 networks",
    "Mapped bipolar channels"
  ),
  metric_group = c("core", "core", "support", "support", "coverage", "coverage")
)

long_df <- raw_df %>%
  select(patient_id, archetype, archetype_label, all_of(metric_specs$metric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(metric_specs$metric),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  left_join(metric_specs, by = "metric") %>%
  mutate(
    metric_label = factor(metric_label, levels = metric_specs$metric_label),
    metric_group = factor(metric_group, levels = c("core", "support", "coverage"))
  )

summary_stats <- long_df %>%
  group_by(metric_group, metric, metric_label, archetype, archetype_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(value)),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1 = quantile(value, probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_table_wide <- summary_stats %>%
  select(metric_label, archetype_label, mean, sd, median, q1, q3, min, max) %>%
  mutate(across(c(mean, sd, median, q1, q3, min, max), ~round(.x, 3))) %>%
  arrange(metric_label, archetype_label)

archetype_palette <- as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("ggthemes::Tableau_10"))[c(1, 2, 3, 4)]
names(archetype_palette) <- levels(raw_df$archetype_label)

bg_fill <- "#FBF7F1"
panel_fill <- "#FFFDF8"
grid_color <- "#E4DCCF"
ink_color <- "#1F2A33"
muted_color <- "#5B6670"

parameter_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color, lineheight = 1.05),
      plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = rel(1.25), color = ink_color),
      plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(size = rel(0.95), color = muted_color),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      axis.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.34),
      plot.title.position = "plot",
      plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.9, "lines"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
}

bootstrap_mean_ci <- function(values, n_boot = 5000, conf = 0.95) {
  values <- values[is.finite(values)]
  alpha <- (1 - conf) / 2
  if (length(values) < 2) {
    return(tibble(mean_diff = mean(values), ci_low = NA_real_, ci_high = NA_real_, n = length(values)))
  }
  reps <- replicate(n_boot, mean(sample(values, size = length(values), replace = TRUE)))
  tibble(
    mean_diff = mean(values),
    ci_low = unname(quantile(reps, probs = alpha, na.rm = TRUE)),
    ci_high = unname(quantile(reps, probs = 1 - alpha, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n = length(values)
  )
}

# A. Occupancy is compositional: normalize within patient and show the full 100%.
occupancy_df <- raw_df %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  mutate(
    occupancy_total = sum(occupancy_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    occupancy_composition = occupancy_pct / occupancy_total * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

patient_order <- occupancy_df %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  summarise(
    dominant_archetype = archetype_label[which.max(occupancy_composition)],
    dominant_value = max(occupancy_composition, na.rm = TRUE),
    entropy = {
      p <- occupancy_composition / 100
      -sum(p * log(p + 1e-12)) / log(length(p))
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(dominant_archetype, desc(dominant_value), entropy)

patient_alias <- patient_order %>%
  mutate(
    patient_alias = sprintf("sub-%02d", row_number()),
    patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = rev(patient_alias))
  ) %>%
  select(patient_id, patient_alias)

occupancy_df <- occupancy_df %>%
  left_join(patient_alias, by = "patient_id")

occupancy_composition_plot <- ggplot(
  occupancy_df,
  aes(x = occupancy_composition, y = patient_alias, fill = archetype_label)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.78, color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = archetype_palette) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))) +
  labs(
    x = "Within-patient occupancy share",
    y = "Anonymized patient"
  ) +
  parameter_theme(base_size = 10.5) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)
  )

# B. Dwell time is paired: show raw paired values plus bootstrap paired contrasts.
dwell_long <- raw_df %>%
  select(patient_id, archetype_label, mean_dwell_ms)

dwell_wide <- dwell_long %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = archetype_label, values_from = mean_dwell_ms)

reference_archetype <- levels(raw_df$archetype_label)[[1]]
contrast_archetypes <- levels(raw_df$archetype_label)[-1]

dwell_contrasts <- bind_rows(lapply(contrast_archetypes, function(target) {
  diff_values <- dwell_wide[[target]] - dwell_wide[[reference_archetype]]
  bootstrap_mean_ci(diff_values) %>%
    mutate(
      contrast = paste(target, "-", reference_archetype),
      contrast = factor(contrast, levels = paste(contrast_archetypes, "-", reference_archetype))
    )
}))

dwell_raw_plot <- ggplot(
  dwell_long,
  aes(x = archetype_label, y = mean_dwell_ms, group = patient_id)
) +
  geom_line(color = scales::alpha(muted_color, 0.22), linewidth = 0.38) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = archetype_label), shape = 21, size = 2.15, color = "white", stroke = 0.25) +
  ggdist::stat_pointinterval(
    aes(group = archetype_label),
    point_interval = ggdist::mean_qi,
    .width = 0.95,
    color = ink_color,
    point_size = 2.4,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    position = position_nudge(x = 0.18)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = archetype_palette, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Archetype",
    y = "Mean dwell time (ms)"
  ) +
  parameter_theme(base_size = 10.5) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

dwell_contrast_plot <- ggplot(dwell_contrasts, aes(x = mean_diff, y = contrast)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#A8A096", linewidth = 0.45, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_linerange(aes(xmin = ci_low, xmax = ci_high, color = contrast), linewidth = 1.05) +
  geom_point(aes(color = contrast), size = 3.1) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%+.1f ms", mean_diff)),
    nudge_y = 0.18,
    size = 3.1,
    color = ink_color
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = archetype_palette[contrast_archetypes], guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = paste("Difference versus", reference_archetype, "(ms)"),
    y = "Paired contrast"
  ) +
  parameter_theme(base_size = 10.5) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank())

dwell_estimation_plot <- dwell_raw_plot + dwell_contrast_plot +
  patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1.15, 0.95))

# C. Assignment similarity: rank patients within each archetype.
similarity_rank_df <- raw_df %>%
  group_by(archetype_label) %>%
  arrange(assignment_similarity, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = row_number(),
    label_extreme = rank == 1 | rank == n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(patient_alias, by = "patient_id")

similarity_mean_df <- similarity_rank_df %>%
  group_by(archetype_label) %>%
  summarise(mean_similarity = mean(assignment_similarity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

assignment_similarity_ranked_plot <- ggplot(
  similarity_rank_df,
  aes(x = rank, y = assignment_similarity, color = archetype_label)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.48, alpha = 0.72) +
  geom_point(size = 2.15, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_hline(
    data = similarity_mean_df,
    aes(yintercept = mean_similarity, color = archetype_label),
    linewidth = 0.58,
    linetype = "dashed",
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = filter(similarity_rank_df, label_extreme),
    aes(label = patient_alias),
    size = 2.7,
    seed = 97411,
    box.padding = 0.22,
    point.padding = 0.16,
    segment.alpha = 0.35,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~archetype_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = archetype_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.06))) +
  labs(
    x = "Within-archetype patient rank",
    y = "Assignment similarity"
  ) +
  parameter_theme(base_size = 10.5) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

# D. Patient x archetype heatmap: z-score each metric before faceting.
heatmap_metrics <- c("occupancy_pct", "mean_dwell_ms", "assignment_similarity")
heatmap_df <- long_df %>%
  filter(metric %in% heatmap_metrics) %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  mutate(
    value_z = as.numeric(scale(value)),
    metric_label = factor(metric_label, levels = metric_specs$metric_label[metric_specs$metric %in% heatmap_metrics])
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(patient_alias, by = "patient_id")

patient_archetype_heatmap_plot <- ggplot(
  heatmap_df,
  aes(x = archetype_label, y = patient_alias, fill = value_z)
) +
  geom_tile(color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.18) +
  facet_wrap(~metric_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166AC",
    mid = "#F7F3EA",
    high = "#B2182B",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "Metric z-score"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Archetype",
    y = "Anonymized patient"
  ) +
  parameter_theme(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.3),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

main_panel_plot <- (occupancy_composition_plot | dwell_estimation_plot) /
  (assignment_similarity_ranked_plot | patient_archetype_heatmap_plot) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.05), widths = c(0.9, 1.35))

summary_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_parameter_summary_stats.csv"))
long_csv_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_parameter_long.csv"))
occupancy_composition_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_occupancy_composition.svg"))
dwell_estimation_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_dwell_paired_estimation.svg"))
similarity_ranked_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_assignment_similarity_ranked.svg"))
heatmap_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_patient_archetype_parameter_heatmap.svg"))
main_panel_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_parameter_main_panel.svg"))

write.csv(summary_table_wide, summary_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(long_df, long_csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
save_panel(occupancy_composition_plot, occupancy_composition_path, width = 8.5, height = 7.2, dpi = 320)
save_panel(dwell_estimation_plot, dwell_estimation_path, width = 12, height = 6.4, dpi = 320)
save_panel(assignment_similarity_ranked_plot, similarity_ranked_path, width = 11.5, height = 5.7, dpi = 320)
save_panel(patient_archetype_heatmap_plot, heatmap_path, width = 11.5, height = 6.8, dpi = 320)
save_panel(main_panel_plot, main_panel_path, width = 18, height = 13, dpi = 320)
```

## Inputs

```{r input-summary}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    item = c("input_csv", "output_dir", "n_patients", "n_rows"),
    value = c(
      input_csv,
      output_dir,
      dplyr::n_distinct(raw_df$patient_id),
      nrow(raw_df)
    )
  ),
  col.names = c("Item", "Value")
)
```

## Descriptive Summary

```{r summary-table}
knitr::kable(summary_table_wide)
```

## Main Panel

```{r main-panel, fig.width=18, fig.height=13}
main_panel_plot
```

## Occupancy Composition

```{r occupancy-composition, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=7.2}
occupancy_composition_plot
```

## Dwell Time Estimation

```{r dwell-estimation, fig.width=12, fig.height=6.4}
dwell_estimation_plot
```

## Ranked Assignment Similarity

```{r assignment-similarity, fig.width=11.5, fig.height=5.7}
assignment_similarity_ranked_plot
```

## Patient-Archetype Heatmap

```{r parameter-heatmap, fig.width=11.5, fig.height=6.8}
patient_archetype_heatmap_plot
```

## Outputs

```{r outputs-table}
output_manifest <- data.frame(
  artifact = c(
    basename(summary_csv_path),
    basename(long_csv_path),
    basename(occupancy_composition_path),
    basename(dwell_estimation_path),
    basename(similarity_ranked_path),
    basename(heatmap_path),
    basename(main_panel_path)
  ),
  path = c(
    summary_csv_path,
    long_csv_path,
    occupancy_composition_path,
    dwell_estimation_path,
    similarity_ranked_path,
    heatmap_path,
    main_panel_path
  )
)
knitr::kable(output_manifest)
```
